open_questions.question: Energy is-not-a Fruit 这件事为什么重要？它会带来什么影响？
open_questions.inferred_answer: Energy is-not-a Fruit 已由关系证据回答。

open_questions.question: Fruit 是什么？它有哪些关键特性？
Energy 是不是一种 Fruit，还是和 Fruit 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Energy is not a fruit. Energy is needed for body activity. NaturalSugar can affect Energy. Energy is related to BodyFunction.

open_questions.question: Energy 和一些已知 Nutrient 例子有相似特征（rel:is-not-a, rel:is-not-a:Fruit）。Energy 会不会也是一种 Nutrient？
open_questions.last_answer: Energy is not a fruit. Energy is needed for body activity. NaturalSugar can affect Energy. Energy is related to BodyFunction.

open_questions.question: Energy 是不是一种 Nutrient，还是和 Nutrient 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Energy is not a fruit. Energy is needed for body activity. NaturalSugar can affect Energy. Energy is related to BodyFunction.

open_questions.question: Energy related-to Health 这件事为什么重要？它会带来什么影响？
Health 是什么？它有哪些关键特性？
Energy related-to Health 这件事为什么重要？它背后的机制或条件是什么？
Energy 和一些已知 Nutrient 例子有相似特征（rel:related-to, rel:related-to:Health）。Energy 会不会也是一种 Nutrient？
open_questions.last_answer: Nutrient is not a fruit. Nutrient is a general category for substances that support BodyFunction and Health. Vitamin is a nutrient. Mineral is a nutrient. DietaryFiber is a nutrient. Potassium is a nutrient.
